real_progress_event_required: One newly visible canonical AVID report or vulnerability identifier tied to the same concrete CVE or incident as a seeded LIMEN security row outside the current Langflow-plus-ToolHive pair.
non_counting_noise_to_ignore: Analogue same-product reports, same-technique similarity, analyst-review CSV traces, product-family richness, or repo-head detail without an exact same-case canonical ID.
claim_upgrade_allowed_if_event_lands: LIMEN may upgrade from replicated-but-still-thin direct-join state to a stronger three-example direct-join pattern for security interoperability, but not to broad AVID incident-census or evidence-tier override claims.
paper_thesis_use: Methods/results exactness paragraph, Table 6A update, reviewer-response note on three-example direct joins, thesis interoperability section.

real_progress_event_required: One defensible exact MITRE ATLAS case-study identifier tied to the same concrete incident, product event, or mechanism as a seeded LIMEN security row.
non_counting_noise_to_ignore: Technique IDs alone, generalized multi-framework case studies, product-family overlap, adjacent family cases, or token/name similarity without same-case identity.
claim_upgrade_allowed_if_event_lands: LIMEN may upgrade from technique-context-only interoperability to mixed graph-plus-case-identity language for one bounded row, but not to ATLAS-as-incident-registry or chronology claims.
paper_thesis_use: Security graph methods prose, case-study-gap discussion, thesis graph-interoperability caution section, reviewer-safe exactness rebuttal.

real_progress_event_required: One additional LIMEN row showing same-event title/date/substance alignment plus at least one corroborating actor, report, or detail field from the verified public AIID route; alternatively, one stronger stable public export proof that materially changes the import ceiling.
non_counting_noise_to_ignore: Snapshot visibility, page-data reachability, taxonomy visibility, archive-series mechanics, or route-description restatements without a second exact overlap or stronger export proof.
claim_upgrade_allowed_if_event_lands: LIMEN may move from one bounded same-event comparator pilot to a replicated public-comparator overlap pattern, but not to bulk completeness, stable classifications, or unrestricted import-rights claims.
paper_thesis_use: Methods/results comparator exactness note, AIID appendix row, reviewer-response boundary on public-overlap replication, thesis section on bounded comparator evidence.
visualization_dashboard_hook: AIID_exact_overlap_occupancy_panel with singleton_to_replicated marker and export-stability caution.

real_progress_event_required: One additional LIMEN row showing same-event title/date/jurisdiction consistency plus article-level metadata from the verified official detail JSON route; alternatively, one stronger explicit reuse statement.
non_counting_noise_to_ignore: Official detail JSON reachability, vocabulary-facet visibility, rights-bounded route prose, or general public-page availability without a second exact overlap or stronger explicit reuse statement.

real_progress_event_required: One anonymous object-level export or equivalent public record-level proof that can be cited as stable public object payload access, or one deliberate shared manuscript/dashboard/table promotion of the current named-anchor/category bridge with explicit concept-layer cautions.
non_counting_noise_to_ignore: Visible taxonomy anchors, JSON-LD dataset metadata, CC BY 4.0 program-surface signals, or named distribution links that still end at login-controlled surfaces without shared bridge reuse.

non_counting_noise_to_ignore: Public article access, conceptual similarity, or first-pass manual interpretation without a second disciplined review or clearer reuse signal.
